title: Köniz, Bern — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Köniz, Bern: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Köniz is a city in Bern with a population of 42,000. A suburban municipality near Bern with a mix of urban and rural living, known for its castle, the Gurten mountain, and excellent schools.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
